title: Add HAL battery and PMIC telemetry snapshots for app compatibility
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic node_info/status can show battery level, voltage, charging/external-power state, but the current Zephyr HAL only exposes battery/PMIC device presence. What needs to be done: add a board-agnostic HAL telemetry snapshot API with validity flags for battery percent, voltage, charging/external power, and provider availability; feed native LICHEN status and Meshtastic DeviceMetrics from it. Acceptance criteria: no app-visible battery field is fabricated as real telemetry; unknown values are explicit; native_sim and at least one board config test cover absent providers.
